$comment: Style-gate invariant spec for /co-pilot (the post-login Home / AI Co-Pilot).
This route is the KNOWN Stage-A burn-in flake: its own CommandRelayListener
surface frequently does not attach a tab before the relay budget -> the route
reports CAPTURE-UNAVAILABLE (green in shadow). Even when it DOES capture, the
co-pilot MAIN content (task heading/input) lands with no bbox, so only the
cross-route left-nav app shell is reliably POSITIONED here.
We therefore assert ONLY on those shell elements (present + positioned whenever
a capture succeeds at all) and DELIBERATELY OMIT no_layout_shift_since: there is
no stable co-pilot baseline (the main surface is non-deterministic) and a shift
baseline on a flaky route would be a future false-gate source. Add layout-shift
for co-pilot only after the relay-attach burn-in lands a deterministic capture.
contrast_meets_wcag is on button-search-k only (the one element with declared
fg+bg colors; sampled-color elements would fail spuriously).
